onboarding_desc_1: Open Centerly and see everything for today — classes, attendance, and payments in one place.
onboarding_desc_2: Track attendance, progress, and full student records — no papers or WhatsApp groups.
onboarding_desc_3: View expected, collected, and remaining payments for each month — send reminders in one tap.
login_subtitle: Log in to continue your day on Centerly
identifier_required: Please enter your email or phone number
identifier_invalid: Please enter a valid email or phone number
password_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
password_uppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
password_lowercase: Must contain at least one lowercase letter
password_number: Must contain at least one number
password_special: Must contain at least one special character
